title: Include Team ID and User ID in All Zapier Webhook Payloads
description:
Update all Zapier webhook outputs to include the public-facing Team ID and User ID (not the auto-increment integer values). These identifiers are critical for tracking activation events — user creation, first login, and first object addition — and connecting them back to the correct user and team.

The user ID format used is a concatenation of the public `dtuserId` and the internal `auth()->user()->id` to enable lookups either way.
acceptance_criteria: All Zapier webhook payloads include the public-facing Team ID
All Zapier webhook payloads include the public-facing User ID
Auto-increment integer IDs are not exposed in webhook payloads
Activation events (new user, first login, first object) all include both IDs
middleware_changes: All Zapier webhook callouts updated to include public Team ID and User ID in the payload. User ID format: `dtuserId.id` concatenation.
implementation_notes: User ID is formatted as `auth()->user()->dtuserId.auth()->user()->id` — concatenating the public-facing ID with the internal ID for bidirectional lookup. This change later caused MBT-459 (race condition with team ID attachment during first login).
comment_summary: Developer added team ID and user ID to all Zapier webhooks. Noted the user ID concatenation format. Product owner confirmed after review.
